The '''scatter pistol''' was a type of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] that was often used by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was a short, blocky [[Blaster/Legends|weapon]] that fired a quad blast of energy.<ref name="SWG" /> The '''Doom Bringer scatter''' was a variation of the pistol.<ref name="TOW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>

*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
